tasks.title: Visit the storefront and confirm whether the location is open tonight
tasks.acceptance: Upload one clear storefront photo that shows the entrance. Add a short location note naming the store and street. Add a timestamp note for when the check was performed. Add a one-line execution summary.

campaign.label: Storefront Check
campaign.brief: Go to the storefront, photograph the entrance and posted business hours, and confirm whether the location is open or closed.
proofRequirements: Upload one clear storefront photo that shows the entrance.
Add a short location note naming the store and street.
Add a timestamp note for when the check was performed.

tasks.title: Check whether the requested product is on shelf and visible to customers
tasks.acceptance: Upload one clear shelf photo showing the requested product area. Add a short location note naming the store and aisle or shelf context. Add a timestamp note for when the shelf audit was completed. Add a one-line execution summary.

campaign.label: Shelf Audit
campaign.brief: Visit the retail location, photograph the product shelf, and note whether the item is in stock and customer-facing.
proofRequirements: Upload one clear shelf photo showing the requested product area.
Add a short location note naming the store and aisle or shelf context.
Add a timestamp note for when the shelf audit was completed.

tasks.title: Collect the signed handoff page from the front desk and confirm the counter code
tasks.acceptance: Upload a clear photo of the signed handoff page or receipt. Add a short location note naming the front desk or pickup counter. Add a timestamp note for the completed pickup. Repeat the required counter code or phrase. Add a one-line execution summary.

campaign.label: Signature Pickup
campaign.brief: Pick up the printed handoff page, make sure it is signed, photograph the signed page, and return the desk code used during pickup.
proofRequirements: Upload a clear photo of the signed handoff page or receipt.
Add a short location note naming the front desk or pickup counter.
Add a timestamp note for the completed pickup.
Repeat the required counter code or phrase.

tasks.title: Pick up the sealed envelope from the locker and confirm the handoff code
tasks.acceptance: Upload a photo of the envelope label, locker screen, or pickup receipt. Add a short location note naming the pickup point. Add a timestamp note for the handoff. Repeat the required pickup code or phrase. Add a one-line execution summary.

campaign.label: Pickup Confirmation
campaign.brief: Go to the pickup locker or desk, collect the envelope, photograph the handoff proof, and include the pickup code supplied at the location.
proofRequirements: Upload a photo of the envelope label, locker screen, or pickup receipt.
Add a short location note naming the pickup point.
Add a timestamp note for the handoff.
Repeat the required pickup code or phrase.

tasks.title: Verify that the requested menu item is still listed and capture the live price
tasks.acceptance: Upload one clear photo of the menu or ordering board. Add a short location note naming the venue checked. Add a timestamp note for the menu check. Add a one-line execution summary.

campaign.label: Menu Check
campaign.brief: Visit the venue, photograph the physical menu or ordering board, and confirm whether the requested item is still available.
proofRequirements: Upload one clear photo of the menu or ordering board.
Add a short location note naming the venue checked.
Add a timestamp note for the menu check.

tasks.title: Check the venue entrance, estimate queue length, and confirm whether entry is open
tasks.acceptance: Upload one clear photo of the venue entrance or queue. Add a short location note naming the entrance checked. Add a timestamp note for when the queue was observed. Add a one-line execution summary.

campaign.label: Venue Queue Check
campaign.brief: Visit the venue entrance, photograph the queue or entrance line, and note the on-the-ground access status.
proofRequirements: Upload one clear photo of the venue entrance or queue.
Add a short location note naming the entrance checked.
Add a timestamp note for when the queue was observed.

tasks.title: Visit the storefront and confirm whether the location is open tonight #3
tasks.acceptance: Upload one clear storefront photo that shows the entrance. Add a short location note naming the store and street. Add a timestamp note for when the check was performed. Add a one-line execution summary.

campaign.label: Storefront Check
campaign.brief: Go to the storefront, photograph the entrance and posted business hours, and confirm whether the location is open or closed.
proofRequirements: Upload one clear storefront photo that shows the entrance.
Add a short location note naming the store and street.
Add a timestamp note for when the check was performed.

tasks.title: Check whether the requested product is on shelf and visible to customers #3
tasks.acceptance: Upload one clear shelf photo showing the requested product area. Add a short location note naming the store and aisle or shelf context. Add a timestamp note for when the shelf audit was completed. Add a one-line execution summary.

campaign.label: Shelf Audit
campaign.brief: Visit the retail location, photograph the product shelf, and note whether the item is in stock and customer-facing.
proofRequirements: Upload one clear shelf photo showing the requested product area.
Add a short location note naming the store and aisle or shelf context.
Add a timestamp note for when the shelf audit was completed.

services.title: LinkedIn Ghostwriting - guaranteed 100k impressions

services.description: I write a high-conviction LinkedIn post optimized for reach, saves, and profile visits. Includes hook strategy and CTA angle.

services.title: Influencer 101
services.shortDescription: Brand growth coaching and practical creator execution plan.
services.description: I audit your positioning and map a weekly posting + community engine.

services.title: Ghostwriting Twitter
services.shortDescription: Viral-style X threads and posts for founder/operator accounts.
services.description: I ghostwrite high-leverage posts based on your voice, goals, and launch context.

services.title: Dad Advice
services.shortDescription: Practical and direct human feedback when AI tone is not enough.
services.description: Grounded perspective for decision stress, planning, and personal productivity.

services.title: Car Driver
services.shortDescription: Local driver service for errands and delivery support.
services.description: Available for driving tasks, package pickup, and scheduled errands with proof.

services.title: Human Experience & Behavioral Evaluation
services.shortDescription: On-site behavior/usability observation with structured notes.
services.description: Observation and assessment with notes, photos, and insight summary.

services.title: AI Legal Product Architecture & Deployment
services.shortDescription: Legal workflow AI architecture with governance and reliability.
services.description: Design, validation, and deployment support for legal AI workflows.

services.title: Room layout concept/design
services.shortDescription: 3D layout concept with utility constraints in mind.
services.description: Room layout concepts with practical render directions from constraints.

services.title: Post memes on your discord for a year
services.shortDescription: Human-operated meme posting and community interaction plan.
services.description: Long-term meme posting stream and active engagement for community health.

services.title: AI Readiness Assessment
services.shortDescription: Practical AI integration roadmap for real operations.
services.description: Business readiness assessment with Monday-morning action plan.

services.title: Research & Analysis
services.shortDescription: Market research and competitive insight with delivery-ready docs.
services.description: Data synthesis and competitor analysis with concise output and next actions.

services.title: Grant Writing & Business Planning
services.shortDescription: Grant applications and practical business planning support.
services.description: Grant packages and business planning documents with execution checkpoints.

services.title: On-site verification with photo evidence
services.shortDescription: Physical site check with time/location proof package.
services.description: I visit the location, capture photo/video proof, and deliver structured notes.

services.title: In-person recon and verification
services.shortDescription: Field recon in Austria with proof artifacts and summary.
services.description: Multisensory field reports including photos, notes, and structured observations.

services.title: Local lead generation support
services.shortDescription: Prospect list building and first-contact support for campaigns.
services.description: I help source prospects, qualify leads, and support first outreach rounds.

services.title: LLM Evaluation Pack
services.shortDescription: Human-in-the-loop model evaluation and benchmark reporting.
services.description: Design eval rubrics, run scorecards, and deliver actionable model quality report.

services.title: Field ops in Austria and EU
services.shortDescription: Pickups, meetings, signing, recon, and local verification tasks.
services.description: Execute urgent local tasks with reliable communication and evidence capture.

services.title: Cargo and goods transportation coordination
services.shortDescription: Local transport coordination with handoff verification.
services.description: Coordinate movement of goods with timing updates and confirmation photos.

services.title: Foshan local procurement
services.shortDescription: Source products and verify supplier availability locally.
services.description: I perform local supplier checks, price collection, and sample verification.

services.title: Texas pickups, errands, and verifications
services.shortDescription: Fast package pickup and local errand execution with proof.
services.description: Coverage around Austin/San Antonio/New Braunfels with timestamped evidence.

services.title: Curitiba local errands
services.shortDescription: Pickup, delivery, and on-site checks in Curitiba area.
services.description: Reliable local operations with short response windows and status updates.

services.title: Full-stack bug fix sprint
services.shortDescription: Rapid implementation and bug fixes for web products.
services.description: From backend debugging to UI bugfixing with tested and documented patch sets.

services.title: Vietnam business intro call
services.shortDescription: Business development intro and local context briefing.
services.description: I provide market context and warm introductions for local business outreach.

services.title: Operations playbook for AI teams
services.shortDescription: Hands-on ops design for hybrid AI+human execution teams.
services.description: I deliver an operations playbook with SLA guardrails and failure handling loops.
